event_title: Cats - A new library for functional programming in Scala
title: Cats - A new library for functional programming in Scala
description: Abstract Cats is a proof-of-concept library intended to provide abstractions for functional programming in Scala. The goal is to provide a lightweight, modular, and extensible library that is approachable and powerful. Learn more here: https://github.com/non/cats Bio After spending a decade Proxying AbstractBeanInstaces from FactoryBuilderImpls in Java land, Stew found himself on a project using Scala, and hasn't looked back since. Stew is currently a software architect for Verizon where he spends a lot of energy evangelizing about the power of a more pure approach to functional programming. In his spare time he's writing documentation for the newly formed Cats project. Schedule • 6:30-7:00 - networking • 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc • 7:10-~8:40 - talk • 8:40-9:00 - networking Parking Please do not park inside the parking garage - instead use street parking. There tends to be some parking on Del Medio Avenue across the street from Box.
